Get in Touch

We'd Love to Hear From You

Have feedback, found a conversion bug, or need a specific font layout supported? Drop us an email and we will get back to you as soon as possible.

Email Support & Feedback

support@fontconverterhub.com
Send Email

Requesting New Layouts

Need DevLys, Chanakya, Shivaji, or Shusha conversion? Drop us an email with sample text files so we can add them to our upcoming releases.

Reporting Translation Errors

If a specific character, half-character (sanyukt), or vowel matra converts incorrectly, please email us the exact input and expected output.

अ Font Converter Hub

Free online tools for Hindi and Nepali font conversion — KrutiDev, Unicode, Mangal, Chanakya, and Preeti. Fast, private, browser-based.
